title: THE DOCK - 211info
text: THE DOCK THE DOCK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center. Offers opportunities to receive peer support, complete homework, and meet new people. Individuals have access to the podcast studio, kitchen with snacks, clothing closet, library, social activities like games, arts and crafts, book club, and movie nights. Event calendar is on website. Accepts gently worn clothing donations and books. 395 11th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: Wednesday-Thursday 1pm-7pm Email (503) 325-3426 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 325-3426 Main phone Main phone (503) 325-3426 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Clothing Donation Programs * Youth Issues Youth Centers Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE DOCK
